result:
If I could change the world in one way, I would increase empathy, compassion and understanding between all people. I believe that so many of the world's problems stem from an "us vs. them" mentality, where different groups see each other as adversaries rather than fellow humans. Prejudice, bigotry, nationalism, tribalism, and selfishness cause immense harm. 

If everyone could truly put themselves in others' shoes, see issues from different perspectives, and feel genuine care and concern for all people regardless of superficial differences, I think it would be transformative. More empathy and compassion would lead to less conflict, discrimination and division. We'd see each other's common humanity. Global cooperation would increase. I believe empathy is the key to a more peaceful, equitable and flourishing world for all.

Of course, increasing empathy is far easier said than done. But if I had a magic wand, that's the change I'd make - a world with far more compassion, and far less apathy and antipathy. A world where we all see ourselves in each other.
